# emailcn

> A shadcn/ui-compatible registry of React Email components and blocks.

## What is this?

emailcn provides beautiful, accessible, and customizable email components built on React Email v6. All components are compatible with shadcn/ui and can be installed via `npx shadcn add`.

## How it works

1. Install react-email: `npm install react-email`
2. Add a theme: `npx shadcn@latest add https://emailcn.com/r/email-theme-default.json`
3. Add components: `npx shadcn@latest add https://emailcn.com/r/email-hero.json`
4. Or add complete email blocks

## Installation

Users can install components from emailcn:

```bash
npx shadcn@latest add https://emailcn.com/r/email-hero.json
```

## Available Themes

- Default, Vercel, Linear, Stripe, GitHub, Notion, Raycast, Twitch, Airbnb, Slack

## Links

- Documentation: https://emailcn.com/docs
- GitHub: https://github.com/Aniket-508/emailcn
- React Email: https://react.email
- shadcn docs: https://ui.shadcn.com/docs/registry

## Tech Stack

- Next.js
- React
- TypeScript
- Tailwind CSS
- Fumadocs (documentation)
- shadcn/ui
- React Email v6
